question: Which physician can treat the crew member who took severe burns in the reactor breach?

graphrag.cypher:
MATCH path = (a:Entity {id:$anchor})-[:REL*1..3]->(b:Entity {role:'physician'})
RETURN [n IN nodes(path) | n.id]  AS ids,
       [r IN relationships(path) | r.type] AS types
ORDER BY length(path) LIMIT 1
